businessBackground: Strike Energy Limited (ASX: STX, ABN/ACN 078 012 745) is an ASX-listed independent gas producer, developer, and explorer focused on conventional gas resources in Western Australia's Perth Basin. Operates ~1.06M acres gross (~880K net) of Perth Basin acreage spanning the proven Permian gas play (Greater Erregulla — north) and the Jurassic wet-gas play (Walyering / Ocean Hill — south). Strategic pivot during FY2025 from pure-play explorer to "vertically integrated gas-to-power" producer following Walyering reserves write-down and South Erregulla appraisal disappointments. Three priority value...
